safetyConstraints: Use only a disposable sandbox tenant or namespace.
Store event body hash/shape only; never store the raw event body.
OpenAPI currently has no cleanup operation for event ingestion, so do not run against durable tenant data.

owner.responsibility: Run event ingestion only with disposable sandbox identifiers, idempotency-key hashing, and post-write verification by hash-only SafeProbeEvidence.

executionChecklist.action: Create one disposable events-ingest probe record in the staging sandbox.
evidenceRequired: no raw URL, request body, response body, tenant data, or env value

executionChecklist.action: Verify the events-ingest write through SafeProbeEvidence and top-level response metadata only.
evidenceRequired: top-level JSON keys or body hash only

executionChecklist.action: Discard the disposable sandbox tenant/namespace that received the event write; OpenAPI has no event delete rollback path.
evidenceRequired: Sandbox id hash, event idempotency-key hash, and post-run sandbox disposal or expiry evidence.
claim boundary updated if rollback is disposable-sandbox-only

rollbackPolicy.rollbackAction: Discard the disposable sandbox tenant/namespace that received the event write; OpenAPI has no event delete rollback path.
rollbackPolicy.rollbackEvidence: Sandbox id hash, event idempotency-key hash, and post-run sandbox disposal or expiry evidence.

requiredEvidence: events-ingest: public report contains hashes, labels, statuses, and counts only
events-ingest: disposable sandbox lifecycle is the rollback boundary

gates.claimBoundary: Do not count event ingestion as live-write-recorded until mechanic.events.ingest produces SafeProbeEvidence with no raw URL, request body, response body, tenant data, or env values.

safetyConstraints: Use only a disposable sandbox tenant or namespace.
OpenAPI currently has no cleanup operation for the bandit write probe, so do not run against durable tenant data.

owner.responsibility: Run bandit or experiment write probes only in a disposable sandbox and verify assignment/result evidence without raw payloads.

executionChecklist.action: Create one disposable experiments probe record in the staging sandbox.
evidenceRequired: no raw URL, request body, response body, tenant data, or env value

executionChecklist.action: Verify the experiments write through SafeProbeEvidence and top-level response metadata only.
evidenceRequired: top-level JSON keys or body hash only

executionChecklist.action: Discard the disposable sandbox tenant/namespace used for the experiment or bandit write; do not write to durable tenant experiments.
evidenceRequired: Sandbox id hash, experiment/bandit probe hash, and sandbox disposal or expiry evidence.
claim boundary updated if rollback is disposable-sandbox-only

rollbackPolicy.rollbackAction: Discard the disposable sandbox tenant/namespace used for the experiment or bandit write; do not write to durable tenant experiments.
rollbackPolicy.rollbackEvidence: Sandbox id hash, experiment/bandit probe hash, and sandbox disposal or expiry evidence.

requiredEvidence: experiments: public report contains hashes, labels, statuses, and counts only
experiments: disposable sandbox lifecycle is the rollback boundary

gates.claimBoundary: Do not count this capability as live-recorded until the listed gate produces SafeProbeEvidence with no raw URLs, payloads, tenant data, or env values.

safetyConstraints: Attempt the built-in non-sensitive campaign probe candidate before requiring an operator-supplied id.
Use a campaign id created for probe/read-only inspection.
Do not store the selected live id in reports; publish only path labels and hashes.
Do not call settlement or validation write operations until disposable sandbox gates are explicit.

owner.responsibility: Seed or select a disposable campaign id, verify read-only status evidence, and retire the seeded campaign after the probe.

executionChecklist.action: Select or seed a disposable campaign identifier and prove it is safe for read-only inspection.
executionChecklist.command: pnpm pbos mechanics probe --profile staging-sandbox; if the campaign default candidate returns 404, rerun after setting PBOS_PROBE_CAMPAIGN_ID to a disposable id
evidenceRequired: no raw URL, request body, response body, tenant data, or env value

executionChecklist.action: Verify the disposable campaign lookup through SafeProbeEvidence.
executionChecklist.command: pnpm pbos mechanics probe --profile staging-sandbox; if the campaign default candidate returns 404, rerun after setting PBOS_PROBE_CAMPAIGN_ID to a disposable id
evidenceRequired: top-level JSON keys or body hash only

executionChecklist.action: Expire, delete, or abandon only the disposable probe campaign through the private seed/admin path; never use a real campaign id.
evidenceRequired: Hash-only follow-up campaign probe showing inactive/404 status or disposable campaign lifecycle record.
claim boundary updated if rollback is disposable-sandbox-only

rollbackPolicy.rollbackAction: Expire, delete, or abandon only the disposable probe campaign through the private seed/admin path; never use a real campaign id.
rollbackPolicy.rollbackEvidence: Hash-only follow-up campaign probe showing inactive/404 status or disposable campaign lifecycle record.

requiredEvidence: campaigns: public report contains hashes, labels, statuses, and counts only
campaigns: disposable sandbox lifecycle is the rollback boundary

gates.nextCommand: pnpm pbos mechanics probe --profile staging-sandbox; if the campaign default candidate returns 404, rerun after setting PBOS_PROBE_CAMPAIGN_ID to a disposable id
gates.claimBoundary: Do not count this capability as live-recorded until the listed gate produces SafeProbeEvidence with no raw URLs, payloads, tenant data, or env values.

safetyConstraints: Use only a disposable webhook destination.
OpenAPI currently has no cleanup operation for webhook endpoints, so do not run against durable tenant data.

owner.responsibility: Provide a disposable webhook destination, run endpoint creation only in the disposable sandbox, and verify the endpoint cannot affect durable tenants.

executionChecklist.action: Create one disposable webhooks probe record in the staging sandbox.
evidenceRequired: no raw URL, request body, response body, tenant data, or env value

executionChecklist.action: Verify the webhooks write through SafeProbeEvidence and top-level response metadata only.
evidenceRequired: top-level JSON keys or body hash only

executionChecklist.action: Use a disposable webhook destination and sandbox namespace, then discard the destination and sandbox record after verification.
evidenceRequired: Webhook URL hash, endpoint response hash, and disposable destination/sandbox disposal evidence.
claim boundary updated if rollback is disposable-sandbox-only

rollbackPolicy.rollbackAction: Use a disposable webhook destination and sandbox namespace, then discard the destination and sandbox record after verification.
rollbackPolicy.rollbackEvidence: Webhook URL hash, endpoint response hash, and disposable destination/sandbox disposal evidence.

requiredEvidence: webhooks: public report contains hashes, labels, statuses, and counts only
webhooks: disposable sandbox lifecycle is the rollback boundary

gates.claimBoundary: Do not count this capability as live-recorded until the listed gate produces SafeProbeEvidence with no raw URLs, payloads, tenant data, or env values.

claimBoundary.publicPositioning: Activation readiness for Playbasis mechanics gates
